channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年4月30日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Zed is 1.0 #2 Tangled – We need a federation of forges #3 Why AI companies want you to be afraid of them #4 Soft launch of open-source code platform for government #5 Ghostty is leaving GitHub #6 Improving ICU handovers by learning from Scuderia Ferrari F1 team #7 GitHub – DOS 1.0: Transcription of Tim Paterson's DOS Printouts #8 Mistral Medium 3.5 #9 Bugs Rust won't catch #10 Letting AI play my game – building an agentic test harness to help play-testing
